name: Pachinko
description: A steady lattice of pegs with bright balls caught mid-fall — each redraw rolls every ball to a new resting spot.

code.style: --ball: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); --bx: @rand(4%, 70%); --by: @rand(4%, 70%); --rule: ( :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 9%; left: 45.5%; top: 45.5%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color1); transition: ease 500ms; } @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 26%; left: var(--bx); top: var(--by); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--ball); box-shadow: 0 calc(26px / @Y) calc(34px / @Y) rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
